meta.intent: Introduce the ice future-value band with a single readable iced rescue route.
meta.expectedPath: Clear the D pair beside the iced route, break the ice, then clear the revealed route material and finish the puppy with low dock residue.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player spends actions on broad side groups that do not touch the iced route and learns those clears do not advance rescue.
meta.whatItProves: Ice can read as rescue-route investment rather than generic obstruction.
meta.notes: Role: teach. Empty cells below and near the target are deliberate rescue-route, spawn-corridor, and mobile-readability space; water is forgiving so the ice lesson stays primary.
